channel.title: Welcome to my Website on Joao Mauricio
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to my Website on Joao Mauricio

item.title: algorithms-and-data-structures-in-go
item.description:
algorithms-and-data-structures-in-go is a repository of commonly used algorithms and data structures, all implemented in Go.

  • Includes classic algorithms like sorting and searching.
  • Designed for learning and improving Go programming skills.

🔗 View on GitHub

item.title: archon
item.description:
archon is a lightweight, low-level package manager built using Bash, designed with POSIX compliance in mind.

  • Simple and effective for managing packages.
  • Follows the POSIX standard for compatibility.

🔗 View on GitHub

item.title: mkbackup
item.description:
mkbackup is a shell script designed to simplify backup creation for directories and data.

  • Supports Bash and Zsh.
  • Ideal for automating data protection.

🔗 View on GitHub

item.title: my-own-shell
item.description:
my-own-shell is a custom command-line shell designed for beginners:

  • Built with Go, compatible with Linux and Windows.
  • Implements familiar Linux commands.
  • Includes essential commands for daily use.

🖥️ A great starting point for learning the command line!
🔗 View on GitHub

item.title: PassManager
item.description:
PassManager is a password manager focused on security and simplicity.

  • Developed in Python.
  • Uses the cryptography library for secure data storage.

🔐 Keep your credentials safe with PassManager!
🔗 View on GitHub

item.title: youtube-audio-downloader
item.description:
youtube-audio-downloader is a simple Bash script to download audio from YouTube.

  • yt-dlp interface to make it easier to use.
  • Supports playlists and individual tracks.
  • Customize download options as needed.

🔗 View on GitHub
